features.f1_desc: Automatically synthesize daily logs into elegant qualitative performance actions.
features.f2_desc: Forecast customer vectors up to three quarters in advance with 98% validated accuracy.

features.f4_desc: Organize large-scale dataset rows with dynamic client-side filtering.

hero.badge: Futuristic AI Health Assistant Mobile App
hero.heading: Your Health in Smart Hands
hero.subheading: Experience سلامتي, a premium mobile application offering real-time AI scan analysis, instant first aid coaching, emergency trauma locator, and an expert medical chat assistant right in your pocket.

features.title: Autonomous AI Clinical Mobile Tools
features.desc: Empower your medical analytics and health decisions directly on your smartphone using premium autonomous modules.
features.f1_desc: Analyze X-rays, MRI, and laboratory scans in real-time using your phone's camera.
features.f2_desc: An expert AI health helper chat always with you to answer symptoms and direct routes.
features.f3_desc: Visual, voice-guided steps on your phone to handle medical incidents in seconds.
features.f4_desc: One-tap emergency broadcast transmitting geo-coordinates to the nearest trauma unit.
features.f5_desc: Live distance maps and GPS directions showing active medical care providers near you.
features.f6_desc: Log symptoms over time on your phone to generate visual reports for medical consults.
features.f7_desc: Personalized AI wellness advice and daily vector optimizations matching your activity logs.
features.f8_desc: Generate professional, consolidated clinical logs to share with your family doctor.

emergency.title: Critical Mobile Emergency Center
emergency.desc: Instant clinical assistance when seconds count. Broadcast alerts, trigger smart first-aid guides, or tap to call hotlines directly on your phone.

stats.section_desc: We directly broadcast medical AI metrics and our platform's operational activity as an affirmation of our commitment to speed and transparency.
stats.users_desc: Patients and users trusting our platform for daily health tracking.
stats.analyses_desc: Laboratory results and scans analyzed and diagnosed by AI.
stats.emergencies_desc: Critical emergency alarms navigated to nearest trauma units.
stats.hospitals_desc: Advanced healthcare facilities and hospitals synced in our loop.
stats.response_time_desc: Unmatched dispatch latency for critical trauma rescue.
stats.ai_accuracy_desc: Clinical-grade analytical precision validated by medical boards.

testimonials.title: Endorsed by Healthcare Pioneers
testimonials.desc: How users and doctors scale their diagnostic vectors using the Salamty mobile application.
testimonials.dr_quote: The Salamty mobile app is an extraordinary clinical companion. It allows patients to check symptoms and share precise PDF reports with us.
testimonials.patient_quote: Having the scan analyzer and panic emergency locator on my phone gives me peace of mind when traveling.
